header.title: Topics
header.withCount_one: {{count}} topic — groups of similar documents scored for novelty and maturity.
header.withCount_other: {{count}} topics — groups of similar documents scored for novelty and maturity.
header.empty: Groups of similar documents from the knowledge base, scored for novelty and maturity.

map.title: Topic map
map.description: Each circle is a theme; its size is the theme's share of documents. Position is relative to the other themes of your base: further right — more mature and active, higher — more novelty and potential. Hover for details, click to open the theme.
map.pending: Technology scoring is in progress — the novelty-and-maturity map will appear after the first computation (usually within an hour). Topics are already available in the list below.
map.aria: Topic map: further right — more mature, higher — more potential

empty.title: No topics yet
empty.description: Topics will appear once documents are processed — similar materials group together automatically.

noResults.title: Nothing found
noResults.description: No topics match the current search and filters. Change the query or reset the filters.
